event.title: "For the future of our society: Let’s spark children’s interest in coding" talk in Paris, France

body.p: OW2con is the European open source conference organized by OW2. An international meeting of developers, IT companies, academics and non-profit organizations. OW2con brings together the entire open source community, during two days of presentations ranging from tech topics to business and ethical issues of open source. It also offers a unique opportunity to establish contact with peers through friendly networking sessions.

Matthias Kirschner, President of the FSFE, will participate in a talk on the topic "For the future of our society: Let’s spark children’s interest in coding" at the OW2con-conference in Paris. The talk takes at 14:00 on the main stage in English. The event is free of charge.
